title: Howl
description: A Fresh-derived framework with file-system routing, file-system APIs, single-pass SSR, and a typed islands runtime.

title: Hushkey
description: iOS app, Chrome extension, and sync server backed by an end-to-end encrypted protocol with zero-knowledge auth.

title: Edge Router
tagline: Sub-millisecond request router for V8 isolates
description: Rust-based request router that replaced a Node.js implementation at Acme Cloud — cut steady-state CPU by 60%.
